illumigoati.achievement_description: Complete day 2 of the Goat Simulator job within 4 minutes from when the escape car is available.

ruler.achievement_name: It Takes a Pig to Kill a Pig
ruler.achievement_description: Drop Floyd the pig on top of a law enforcer.

arena_logo.achievement_description: Complete The Alesso Heist without your crew killing anyone.

spartan.achievement_description: Complete The Big Bank job with 16 secured bags.

warface.achievement_name: UMP for Me, UMP for You
warface.achievement_description: Kill 45 Russian specials on the Boiling Point job with any Submachine Gun on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

split.achievement_description: On the Undercover job, place 10 planks on windows, vents or fences.

rebel.achievement_description: Complete the Murky Station job within 7 minutes of starting it.

med_pat.achievement_name: Their Armor Is Thick and Their Shields Broad
med_pat.achievement_description: Kill 10 shields with a Gage Chivalry Pack melee weapon in a single heist.

my_little.achievement_name: What? You Want Me to Dance?
my_little.achievement_description: Complete the Scarface Mansion job in stealth in 13 minutes or less on the Mayhem difficulty or above.

horus.achievement_description: In The Diamond job, steal the Diamond and escape in under 10 minutes.

oni.achievement_description: Kill 100 enemies in a single day of a heist with the Kross Vertex Submachine Gun.

tribalface.achievement_description: Kill 10 enemies in a row by shooting them in the head with a Sniper Rifle while not aiming down the sights.

chips.achievement_description: Complete the Golden Grin Casino job in stealth.

venomous.achievement_description: Perform 250 headshot kills using any sniper rifle.

runes.achievement_description: In The Diamond job, secure 10 bags of additional loot.

hiptobepolygon.achievement_name: Do You Like Hurting Other People?
hiptobepolygon.achievement_description: In the Hotline Miami job, kill 30 thugs with the Baseball Bat.

hotel_pattern.achievement_description: Complete The Yacht Heist without killing anyone.

continental.achievement_description: Complete The Yacht Heist after having killed every security guard on the boat.

bear_fight.achievement_description: Kill 300 enemies using any weapons from the Gage Russian Weapon Pack.

flammable.achievement_name: Stick a Fork in Me, I'm Done
flammable.achievement_description: Set an enemy on fire and kill him with the "Motherforker" melee weapon.

cro_pattern_4.achievement_description: In The Bomb: Forest job, cut down all trees within 5 seconds.

doodles.achievement_description: On day 2 of the Hotline Miami job, save someone in need.

wingsofdeath.achievement_description: Perform 500 headshot kills using any sniper rifle.

deathdealer.achievement_description: Kill 25 enemies while in stealth using the Trench knife.

cro_pattern_1.achievement_description: Complete The Bomb: Forest job without letting any civilian flee or die, having at least five civilians in the heist, while escaping with the boat.

fur.achievement_description: In day 2 of the Goat Simulator job, send all goats in separate cages on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

predator.achievement_description: In the Art Gallery job, complete the heist in stealth within 4 minutes with each crew member wearing the Improved Combined Tactical Vest and no Armor Bag deployable equipped.

palmtrees.achievement_description: In day 2 of the Hotline Miami job, reach the Commissar's apartment in under 210 seconds on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

tribalwave.achievement_description: In the Birth of Sky job, release the money without having any player take health damage on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

daisy.achievement_description: Complete the Firestarter job on the OVERKILL difficulty or above with your crew using only Pistols.

cro_pattern_2.achievement_description: Complete The Bomb: Dockyard job in stealth on the Death Wish difficulty or above.

oneshot.achievement_description: Kill 30 snipers with any Sniper Rifle on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

dinostripes.achievement_description: In the Firestarter job, complete the heist on the OVERKILL difficulty or above, with all days done in loud and with a crew of 4 players using unmodified "AK Rifle" rifles and "PARA" submachine guns.

spidereyes.achievement_description: Perform 100 headshot kills using any sniper rifle.

red_star.achievement_description: Kill 32 enemies without reloading with the Tatonka Submachine Gun.

youkai.achievement_name: Names Are for Friends, so I Don't Need One
youkai.achievement_description: Get eleven kills with the Lebensauger .308 Sniper Rifle without reloading it.

checkered_out.achievement_description: Kill a black Bulldozer with the Great Sword melee weapon.

cro_pattern_3.achievement_description: In The Bomb: Forest job, do not let the cops disconnect the water hose while you are using the river water pump.

emperor.achievement_description: Kill 25 thugs using the Ding Dong breaching tool melee weapon.

tire_fire.achievement_description: In the first day of The Biker Heist, find the secret item.

hotflames.achievement_description: Set a Bulldozer on fire for at least 10 seconds.

hawkhelm.achievement_description: In The Diamond job, complete the heist, diamond puzzle and steal the Diamond after the alarm has been triggered on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

baba_yaga.achievement_description: On the Brooklyn 10-10 job, reach Charon within 6 minutes on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.

roman.achievement_description: In The Big Bank job, hack the correct computer on the first try.

native.achievement_description: Kill 6 law enforcers within 6 seconds of killing the first while hipfiring with the Peacemaker .45 Revolver.

cards.achievement_description: Complete the Golden Grin Casino job under 14 minutes.

kurbits.achievement_description: On the Counterfeit job, disarm the C4 on the OVERKILL difficulty or above.
